steps.title: Determine what the underlined sentence does
steps.content: The underlined sentence states that by featuring Blackfeet main characters, the novel “helped to ensure that Indigenous people have a place within the horror genre.” Its purpose is to draw attention to the cultural significance of that Indigenous representation.

steps.title: Match the function to each choice
steps.content:
Only one choice accurately names what the sentence does.
  • "It highlights the significance of the portrayal of Indigenous people in *My Heart Is a Chainsaw*.": exactly describes the sentence’s role — underscoring the cultural importance of Indigenous representation in the novel. ✓
  • "It asks why so many readers who don't enjoy the horror genre have purchased *My Heart Is a Chainsaw*.": the sentence makes no mention of reader motivation or purchasing behavior. ✗
  • "It predicts that non-Indigenous authors will include more Indigenous characters in their work.": the sentence makes no prediction about other authors’ future choices. ✗
  • "It challenges the widely held view that Stephen Graham Jones based *My Heart Is a Chainsaw* on events in his own life.": the sentence does not challenge any biographical claim. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
